name: Detective Conan (+Magic Kaito)
description:
Detective Conan/Magic Kaito World

Yes. Yes. I did it. And yes, this is my first bot. If anyone is wondering, then yes, this is pretty much the goddamn full Detective Conan wiki. It's mostly characters.

To preempt questions: No, I don't know how to use these Lore books. If you could help me figure this thing out, I'd be happy. In the future, if I get the hang of the books, I could add specific cases you and I find interesting to the scenarios. Of course, the main plot scenes are in the bot's description, but there aren't that many of them. Enjoy, I hope you like it, my dear detectives.

I died. Good luck to my fav almost-dead fandom.

(I advise using a proxy. Seriously. Janitor won't handle it here. And yeah, my English isn't great, guys, it's not my native language.)
